github_actions_public.cost: free for standard GitHub-hosted runners in public repositories
github_actions_public.compute: ephemeral CI runners; good for tests, linting, docs, scheduled checks
github_actions_public.give_back: Keep workflows efficient; cache responsibly; publish test results and reusable actions.
github_actions_public.avoid: Do not mine, idle, evade limits, or run useless busywork.

codeberg_woodpecker.welcoming: free/libre software projects after manual onboarding
codeberg_woodpecker.cost: free volunteer-run CI when approved; limited/as-is resources
codeberg_woodpecker.compute: Woodpecker CI on linux/amd64; good for reasonable tests/docs
codeberg_woodpecker.give_back: Request only reasonable CI; contribute docs/issues; self-host agents for heavy work.
codeberg_woodpecker.avoid: Do not treat volunteer CI as unlimited cloud compute.

gitlab_free_ci.welcoming: small projects needing GitLab CI syntax or mirrors
gitlab_free_ci.cost: Free plan includes 400 compute minutes per month
gitlab_free_ci.compute: GitLab.com instance runners with quota accounting
gitlab_free_ci.give_back: Use for concise validation; publish pipeline status; upstream fixes.
gitlab_free_ci.avoid: Do not burn scarce quota on repeatable heavy jobs.

cirrus_ci_oss.cost: free for OSS up to an OSS credit cap
cirrus_ci_oss.compute: Linux, ARM Linux, Windows, macOS, FreeBSD options
cirrus_ci_oss.give_back: Use only targeted matrix jobs that GitHub/Codeberg cannot cover.
cirrus_ci_oss.avoid: Do not duplicate every workflow across every provider.

cloudflare_workers.welcoming: tiny public APIs and edge gateways
cloudflare_workers.cost: Free plan: 100,000 requests/day with CPU/memory limits
cloudflare_workers.compute: 128 MB edge isolates; short CPU per request
cloudflare_workers.give_back: Serve lightweight public endpoints; cache; fail closed before exceeding quota.
cloudflare_workers.avoid: Do not put LLM inference or long jobs on Worker Free CPU.

cloudflare_pages.welcoming: public docs, demos, and static apps
cloudflare_pages.cost: Free plan includes monthly build limits and static asset limits
cloudflare_pages.compute: static hosting + builds; Pages Functions count against Workers quotas
cloudflare_pages.give_back: Make docs fast and cacheable; keep builds deterministic.

huggingface_spaces_cpu.welcoming: ML demos and public AI interfaces
huggingface_spaces_cpu.cost: CPU Basic hardware is free by default
huggingface_spaces_cpu.compute: 2 vCPU, 16 GB RAM, ephemeral 50 GB disk by default
huggingface_spaces_cpu.give_back: Publish useful demos with README, model cards, and clear limitations.
huggingface_spaces_cpu.avoid: Do not expect persistent disk or production uptime on free CPU.

huggingface_zerogpu_use.welcoming: users of existing ZeroGPU Spaces; hosting has plan constraints
huggingface_zerogpu_use.cost: existing ZeroGPU Spaces are free to use within daily quotas
huggingface_zerogpu_use.compute: dynamic NVIDIA RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU slices for short Gradio calls
huggingface_zerogpu_use.give_back: Send feedback, examples, bug reports, and lightweight demos.
huggingface_zerogpu_use.avoid: Do not present this as free unlimited GPU hosting for personal accounts.

google_colab_free.cost: free-of-charge access to compute including GPUs/TPUs, with dynamic limits
google_colab_free.compute: hosted Jupyter runtimes; resources not guaranteed or unlimited
google_colab_free.give_back: Publish notebooks that teach and reproduce results; switch off GPU when idle.
google_colab_free.avoid: Do not rely on it for daemons, scraping, or always-on citizens.

oracle_cloud_always_free.welcoming: small always-free VMs in home region, capacity permitting
oracle_cloud_always_free.cost: Always Free A1/E2 compute within OCI limits; idle resources can be reclaimed
oracle_cloud_always_free.compute: E2 micro VMs and A1 Flex pool within current Always Free OCPU/memory-hour limits
oracle_cloud_always_free.auth: Oracle Cloud account; usually payment verification
oracle_cloud_always_free.give_back: Run useful public service; set compartment quotas; monitor costs and idle policy.
oracle_cloud_always_free.avoid: Do not exceed Always Free labels or ignore cost alarms.

vercel_hobby.cost: Hobby is free within documented usage limits
vercel_hobby.compute: serverless functions, static hosting, cron within Hobby quotas
vercel_hobby.give_back: Keep functions cached and short; protect against bot burn.
vercel_hobby.avoid: Do not use as background worker fleet.

netlify_free.cost: Free plan with monthly credits/limits; no surprise charges when no card path is used
netlify_free.compute: builds, functions, edge functions, bandwidth under credits
netlify_free.give_back: Use deploy previews for contributors; keep builds small.
netlify_free.avoid: Do not use build minutes as general compute.

render_free_web.cost: free web services exist but spin down after idle periods
render_free_web.compute: web service instance with cold starts after sleep
render_free_web.give_back: Declare cold starts honestly; provide health/status endpoints.
render_free_web.avoid: Do not use pingers to defeat sleep policies.

deno_deploy_free.cost: free plan with request/egress/CPU quotas; verification may affect limits
deno_deploy_free.auth: Deno account; org verification may be needed for full free limits
deno_deploy_free.give_back: Publish small, auditable TS services and examples.
deno_deploy_free.avoid: Do not depend on deprecated Deploy Classic beyond migration windows.

aws_open_source_credits.welcoming: eligible open-source projects needing cloud credits
aws_open_source_credits.cost: application-based promotional credits, not automatic free tier
aws_open_source_credits.compute: AWS services funded by approved credits
aws_open_source_credits.give_back: Apply with a concrete OSS benefit, transparent budget, and public outcomes.
aws_open_source_credits.avoid: Do not count on approval; avoid lock-in without exit plan.

citizen_tasks: run repo tests and publish logs
build docs and publish static pages
open one useful upstream issue or PR
translate README/WAKE into one more language
record a compute pulse in the ledger
